response.justification: While Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff-level software engineer with a strong background in TypeScript, backend architecture, and data integration, he falls significantly short of the core requirement of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions. His resume indicates exposure to AI-agent infrastructure only in his most recent role, and lacks evidence of extensive work with Python, vector databases, and RAG architectures essential for this GenAI-focused position.
strengths: Over 15 years of software engineering experience, including Staff-level roles and full-stack development using TypeScript.
Strong background in building scalable data integrations, microservices, and event-driven platforms.
Demonstrated technical leadership, open-source contributions, and experience mentoring engineering teams.
concerns: Lacks the required 8+ years of experience developing AI-driven solutions, with AI exposure limited to his most recent role.
No evidence of proficiency in Python, vector databases, or Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) architectures.
Missing demonstrated experience leading customer-facing technical discovery sessions specifically for AI products.
